location.office_time_required: 3 days per week on Mondays, Wednesdays, and Thursdays

level_signals: Lead a cross-functional pod of engineers, designers, and data scientists
Base pay range $128,000-$160,000 in SF area

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 3+ years of product management experience, ideally with meaningful time spent on consumer-facing products
Track record of shipping products with measurable user and business impact
Strong ability to drive cross-functional alignment - you manage ambiguity, complexity, and interdependencies in an organized way
Data fluency - you define and analyze metrics that inform the success of your products, and you're comfortable running and interpreting experiments
Strong communication skills across audiences and levels, including the ability to convey complex tradeoffs in a clear and compelling way
Customer obsessed - strong user empathy and experience in the customer discovery and product development process

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Ideally have experience with marketplace products or premium consumer experiences
Bonus: familiarity with travel platforms, supply-side marketplace dynamics, or EV/sustainability initiatives
Leverage AI tools and emerging technology to accelerate your team's workflows and enhance the products you build

scope.surface: Lyft Black and Black SUV (Premium Modes), EV/electrification strategy
scope.business_model: B2C ridesharing marketplace, premium consumer product
primary_metrics_inferred: Rider adoption and retention of Premium modes
Driver quality / supply for premium tiers
core_responsibilities: Own your product area end-to-end - from problem identification through launch, growth, and iteration. Translate Lyft's strategic priorities into an ambitious roadmap for your area and be accountable for outcomes
Deliver on this vision by setting your team's goals, success metrics, and roadmap to align with Lyft's mission - designing and running experiments to drive maximum impact
Drive a rapid experimentation and learning culture by continuously shipping and iterating on products, while staying deeply customer obsessed
Lead a cross-functional pod of engineers, designers, and data scientists - setting context, maintaining momentum, and unblocking the team
Deeply understand your customers across different rider segments and use cases, leveraging data analysis, market research, and user research to inform decisions
Collaborate across the company and communicate roadmaps, priorities, and decisions clearly to audiences ranging from partner teams to executive levels
Leverage AI tools and emerging technology to accelerate your team's workflows and enhance the products you build

compensation.equity_form: potential equity offering mentioned but not detailed

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed ($128K-$160K base in SF area)
High ownership role explicitly stated — 'high-ownership role at the center of a business Lyft is betting on'
Clear product surface with strategic importance (premium growth + EV strategy)
Equity mentioned as part of package
Hybrid schedule with flexibility to work from anywhere up to 4 weeks per year
red_flags: Hybrid requires 3 specific days per week in office (Mon/Wed/Thu) — limited schedule flexibility
Compensation range only stated for San Francisco area; other locations not specified
Visa sponsorship not mentioned — unclear for non-US citizens
AI tools usage listed as a responsibility but not a stated requirement — ambiguous whether it is truly expected

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from comp range and years required)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; not stated in JD)
ambiguities: 'Leverage AI tools and emerging technology to accelerate your team's workflows' appears in Responsibilities (suggesting a must-have) but is not listed in the Experience section; classified as nice_to_have due to lack of explicit requirement language
'ideally with meaningful time spent on consumer-facing products' softens the 3+ years requirement somewhat but the 3-year minimum is treated as hard per unconditional bullet framing
Compensation range is stated only for San Francisco area; role may be open to other locations at different ranges, but only SF is mentioned in the JD body
